title: memory_libmap: look for ram_style attributes on surrounding signals

features.name: rom inference with ram_style attribute on output register
features.description: Code should include a ROM inferred from a clocked case statement with (* ram_style = "block" *) attribute placed on the output register

features.name: no_ram attribute as ram_style synonym
features.description: Code should include (* no_ram *) attribute on a signal as a synonym for (* ram_style = "logic" *) to prevent RAM inference
